@if (isLoading()) {

Loading order…

} @else if (error() && !order()) {

{{ error() }}

} @else if (order(); as o) {

Order / {{ o.order_number }}

@if (o.status !== 'CLOSED') { } @else { }

{{ o.subscription_number }}

{{ o.status }}
Customer: {{ o.customer_name ?? '—' }}
Plan: {{ o.plan_name ?? '—' }}
Billing Period: {{ o.billing_period ?? '—' }}
Start Date: {{ formatDate(o.start_date) }}
End Date: {{ formatDate(o.expiration_date) }}
@if (o.invoice) {

Invoice

{{ o.invoice.invoice_number }} {{ o.invoice.status }}
@if (o.payment) {
Payment: {{ o.payment.payment_method }}
Payment Status: {{ o.payment.payment_status }}
Payment Date: {{ formatDate(o.payment.payment_date) }}
}
}
@if (o.items && o.items.length > 0) {
@for (prod of o.items; track prod.product_id) { }
Products Quantity Unit Price Amount
{{ prod.product_name }} {{ prod.quantity }} Unit {{ formatAmount(prod.unit_price) }} {{ formatAmount(prod.amount) }}
Untaxed Amount {{ formatAmount(o.subtotal) }}
Tax {{ formatAmount(o.tax_amount) }}
@if (o.discount_amount) {
Discount -{{ formatAmount(o.discount_amount) }}
}
Total {{ formatAmount(o.total_amount) }}
}
}
